data.body: S2 tree reviews: S2a/S2b/S2c PASS clean (0 findings); S2 (0ee8) PASS clean on r2 (r1 hit transient origin/tickets ref-lock race from 4 parallel reviews). Claimed S2 (0ee8) + S2a (89f9). S1 #582: LLM-Review +MAX, Verified pending. Implementing S2a (gerrit.py stdlib helper + loop.py selection/rebase-routing) under held-out TDD.
